name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
ℹ️ Here's how Football Predictor works:

• ⚽ Matches — see upcoming games
• 🔮 Predict — pick who you think will win
• 🏆 Leagues — browse by league
• 🏆 Leaderboard — check the top predictors
• 📊 My Guesses — review your predictions

Tap /start to open the menu and get going!

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
